visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of four individuals stands in a bright, white-walled office space with wooden floors. The group consists of a man in a lime green long-sleeved shirt and ripped grey jeans, a woman in a dark blue jumpsuit with her hair in two small buns, and two people wearing exaggerated oversized character masks—one of a cartoonish tan-skinned man and another of a grey-haired old man. They are gesturing enthusiastically toward the camera with open hands and energetic facial expressions. (2) The camera cuts to a medium-close shot of the man in green and the woman in the jumpsuit as they point aggressively at the camera, then shift to a wider shot showing the whole group clapping and cheering. Behind them, several cardboard boxes and transparent bags filled with colorful items are scattered on the floor and on tables. (3) A series of fast cuts showcases various items: large plastic bags overflowing with clothing and accessories, shelves lined with dozens of small 'Dragon Ball' figurines, and larger, detailed anime statues (GK models) placed on desks. The lighting is consistent and bright throughout. (4) The man in the green shirt walks around the room, gesturing toward the displays of toys and clothes. He points at various items while different price tags and category labels appear as overlays. The woman and the masked figures remain in the background, clapping and mimicking his high-energy movements. (5) The entire group regathers in the center of the room. They wave their hands and point toward the bottom of the frame, smiling and maintaining high-intensity energy. The background remains the cluttered but brightly lit office space, now featuring a sign indicating 'Old Harvard Office.'
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 是啦鄉親啊沒有錯. (2) [Subtitle]: 隆重跟大家宣佈. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們哈佛要來辦惜福祭啦. [Slogan]: 哈佛惜福祭. (4) [Variety]: 尖叫聲!!. [Slogan]: 2月8日-2月9日. (5) [Subtitle]: 惜福祭有什麼好康的勒. (6) [Subtitle]: 有我們haha baby平時的一些服飾啊. [Logo]: haha baby. (7) [Slogan]: 服飾 手作 生活用品. (8) [Subtitle]: 福利品全部便宜出清啊. [Variety]: 有非常多好康. (9) [Variety]: 非常多好東西. [Variety]: 好便宜的東西可以撿. (10) [Subtitle]: 不只有haha baby, 還有來來來. (11) [Slogan]: 嘎哥跟二伯的二手衣 鞋子 包包. (12) [Slogan]: 嘎哥的玩具. (13) [Slogan]: GK模型. [Slogan]: 全部出清價. (14) [Slogan]: 斷捨離之王. (15) [Slogan]: 嘎哥二手衣 $100起. (16) [Slogan]: 公仔玩具們 $3000起. (17) [Slogan]: 舊哈佛辦公室. (18) [Subtitle]: 邀請大家一起來玩. (19) [Subtitle]: 歡迎大家來朝聖一下我們的哈佛辦公室. (20) [Subtitle]: 送他最後一程. (21) [Slogan]: 時間: 2月8號 9號. (22) [Slogan]: 2月8日 全哈比. (23) [Slogan]: 2月9日 全部. (24) [Slogan]: 請參考下方活動資訊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female creator, 2 people wearing character masks.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man in a lime green long-sleeved shirt with ripped black/grey jeans; one woman in a dark blue jumpsuit with hair tied in two buns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious, brightly lit white office or studio with wooden flooring. The space is filled with numerous boxes, bags of merchandise, and shelves of anime figurines.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male greeting in Traditional Chinese. A fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop BGM kicks in immediately with a strong, driving beat. (2) A sharp 'Ding' SFX punctuates the mention of the festival name. The male speaker maintains a high pitch and rapid speech rate. (3) A 'Whoosh' SFX accompanies a fast transition as a female voice joins the conversation with an equally excited and friendly tone. (4) A comic 'Pop' SFX triggers as the 'haha baby' brand is mentioned. The BGM remains constant in the background at a moderate volume relative to the speech. (5) Another 'Ding' SFX signals the start of the item list. The voices exhibit high arousal and positive valence, frequently overlapping with energetic shouting from the masked background characters. (6) A sequence of rapid 'Whoosh' and 'Ding' SFX occurs during the price and category showcase. The spectral brightness is high, emphasizing the clarity of the studio-recorded voices. (7) The BGM swells slightly as the group claps collectively, accompanied by an 'Applause' SFX layer. (8) Final closing remarks are delivered with high authority and enthusiasm, ending with a rhythmic drum fill from the BGM as the audio fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Detailed Listing -> Pricing Information -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy promotional announcement for a personal flea market event organized by the creators. It aims to generate excitement and drive foot traffic by showcasing a wide variety of items for sale, including personal clothing and expensive collectibles, while highlighting low starting prices and the 'last chance' to visit their old office space.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are directly promoting their own brand 'haha baby' and a specific event they are hosting.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic social media 'variety show' editing styles, with high-contrast text and frequent sound effects to maintain audience engagement throughout the promotional list.
